`42`: **Original comment (now resolved)**

<details>
<summary>🧹 Nitpick</summary>

```diff
-die() { echo "checks: $*" >&2; exit "${2:-1}"; }
+die() { printf 'checks: %s\n' "$*" >&2; exit "${2:-1}"; }
```
